scripts.docs:build: HOME=$PWD/.tmp-home NODE_PATH=$PWD/node_modules NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=$PWD/.npm-cache npm_config_cache=$PWD/.npm-cache hugo --source local-docs
scripts.docs:serve: HOME=$PWD/.tmp-home NODE_PATH=$PWD/node_modules NPM_CONFIG_CACHE=$PWD/.npm-cache npm_config_cache=$PWD/.npm-cache hugo server --source local-docs --disableFastRender
